4 | P a g e 
 
KULUMBUNUNA 
Kwiza  chakulinangula chachihya, echi chinalumuna vilongeselo vyakutanga  
chakalikilamu inemanyina  hauhashi wakunangakana vyuma (competence based 
curriculum)  chinanehe kwalumuka mukulinangula vyuma kuhichila mukuvilinga 
kaha nachilingisa valongi kukwata chinyingi chamumyaka ino mukuzamikisa kupwa 
nachinyingi chakuzata milimo yakumavoko.  
Uno mukanda wavilongeselo vyamwakunangwila vakashikola vali mufwomu 1 
vanausoneka mujila yauhashi wakunangakana vyuma vyanangwilo najishimbi 
jakumona nge kulinangula chinalitoto  nakayoyelo kavathu. Mauhashi akunangakana 
vyuma vanahake mukalikilamu ya 2023  osena analitasana navyuma vyanangwilo 
vanasoneka mumukanda uno  
Mukanada uno unemanyina hakukafwa  milongeshi  vanakunangula seteko yavalongi  
vali mufwomu 1 kunangula vilongeselo vyakalikulumu inemanyina hakunangula 
valongi vyuma vatela kulinga  (competence based curriculum) halwola kunahono 
mikanda vanetavila kuzachisa mumashikola. Echi chili nakusolola kufwila 
chamuthango wafulumende watala vyamashilo kumona ngana ngwavo milimo 
yamulongeshi vanayashiwisa. Hakulinga ngocho, milongeshi vatela kuzachisa 
chinyingi valinacho chakutanga nakuwana vyuma vikwavo navivakafwako 
mukunangula valongi mumaukalu vanahase kuwana mukunangula vilongeselo evi .  
Ngunachifwelela ngwami milongeshi navazachisa mukanda ou mujila yakwoloka.  
 
Kelvin Mambwe (PhD) 
Permanent Secretary- Educational Services 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

5 | P a g e 
 
KUSAKWILILA 
Mukanda uno wavilongeselo  vyakutanga Litilicha mu Luvale kuli valongi mu form 1   
vaulongesele kuhichila mukuhulyojola vathu vavavulu  nakuhomesa vathu hamwe. 
Vathu vavavulu hamwe kaha namauka avathu akulisezaseza vavahulishile 
nakuvahana nawa lisesa lyakuhana vishinganyeka vyavo havyuma vyatela 
kusonekewa mumukanda uno. Hakulinga ngocho, ngunahane kusakwilila chami kuli 
vathu vosena, namauka akulisezaseza  ahanyine chinyingi chavo hamwe kaha 
nakukafwa 
chamali 
chinahashisa 
kusoneka

Mukukumisa, ngunasakwilila kulihana chavakakuza vakuchihanda chatala vilongeselo 
vyakutanga mumashikola cha Directorate of Curriculum Developmen hakuzata 
nakumona ngana ngwavo mulimo wakosoneka mukanda wakunangula vakashikola 
unazachiwa mujila yamwenemwene 
 
Charles Ndakala, (Dr.) 
Director ŌĆō Curriculum Development 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

7 | P a g e 
 
KUJIMBULA 
Mukanda uno wavilongeselo vyakunangula va fwomu 1  vanausoneka mangana ukafweko 
milongeshi mukunangula valongi vinangwilo vya Luvale. Mukalikilamu vanalumuna.  Uno 
mukanda wavinangwilo  vanausoneka managana uzachiwe mukwashiwisa kunangula valongi  
vatete navaputuka  kulinangula vilongeselo vya 2023 kalikilamu shimbu kanda  kupwenga  
kulongesa nakusonejeka  mikanda  ivene  vatela kuzachisa mukutanga nakutangisa. 
Mukutwalililaho, uno mukada uli nakusolola kufwila nakulihana chafulumende kuhichila 
kumuthango watala vyamashikola mukuputuka  kunangula vyakwalumuka chakutanga 
kalikilamu ya 2023 nawa inamono ngana ngwayo vyuma vanasoneka mumukanda uno 
vinatemo mukunangula valongi vyuma navalinangula nakuzata namavoko avo kweseka 
naseteko yakunangakana chalwola tunahetemo. 
Numba tuhu uno mukanda vanaukupwisa nakuzamikisa vyuma vyakunangula valongi, 
milongeshi vatela kuzachisa chinyingi nauhashi wakutanga chavo nakumona ngana ngwavo 
vali nakuhakilako vyuma vikwaavo vinahase kuzamikisa kutanga chavalongi chikumanyi 
haze vanamono ngana ngwavo hali liphwata. Kuhakilako nawa,  milongeshi vanahase 
kwalumuna milimo chipwe vyuma navalinga valongi  vili mumukanda uno kweseka nakupwa 
chashikola  nashikola vali nakutangilamo valongi. 
Vilongeselo vyosena vili mumukanda uno vanavijinyina mukumona ngana ngwavo valongi 
vali nakulinangula vyuma navalinga namavoko avo anakuzamikisa nawa kujiminyina 
muvishinganyeka kaha nawa nakumona ngana nge khala  chihela  chipwe shikola valiho 
valongi  vanahase kulinangula mujila yamwenemwene. Echi kuvwovuwa khana 
chinemanyinana hakuhana uswa wakutanga  nakunganyala chakalikiilamu yakukupuka                       
kuli khala longi chakuzeneka kutala okwo afuma chipwe omu apwa. 
Hilufwelelo lwakumona nge mukanda ou  navinangwilo vilimo vavimone kulema  kupwa 
vyuma navikafwa milongeshi kunangula  valongi chinyingi, uhashi nalilimi lyaLuvale  
navilinga vyamwenemwene mukulinangula chakukupuka. 
MWAKUZACHISHILA MUKANDA 
Mukanda  ou unahane vyuma vize navatangisa muthemu 2 mu fwomu 1. Vanaupange 
mumitwe yavihande kaha mutwe wachihande uli navyuma vyakulihandununa 
vyakufwana nge kuhanjika na kwivwilila, kutanga chakujimina na kusoneka. Vyuma 
vili  omu mumukanda kavyeshi vilongeseloko oloze vyakuzachisa kusoneka 
vilongeselo.Hakuwahisa  vilongeselo watela kufumisa vihanda vya mutwe

8 | P a g e 
 
wachihande kuvyuma vyakulisezaseza. Chinjikizo, mutwe wachihande watela kupwa 
kuhanjika na kwivwilila, mazu, kutanga na kusoneka. Omu nauwahisa mutwe 
wachihande watela kusakula vyuma vyakunangula namilimo oyo vatela  kuzata 
nauhashi 
wakunangakana. 
Shikaho 
mutwe 
wachihande 
naupwa 
nauhashi 
wakunangakana vyuma vyavivulu.Ngocho, watela kusakula chuma echi nachimbata 
lwola lwalunene muchihande chove. Kuhakilako nawa, milimo vanakuhane 
mumukandavene ou kawatela kuyikumisa muchihande chimweko. Evi vanahase 
kuvikilikita muvilongeselo vyakulihandununa  handununa. 
MWAKUNANGWILA 
Hakunangula, mutwe wachihande watela kukavangiza jijila jakutangiwiilamo. Echi 
nachikukafwa kutangisa chinangwilo hichinangwilo vanale.

12 | P a g e 
 
CHIHANDE 1: LITILICHA YAKUHANJIKA 
KWAULA: Kapetulu ou, mwatala hamilimo yamiyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. Kechi 
ngocho kahako oloze namupwa nawa kulumbununa miyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. 
UHASHI WAKUNANGAKANA VYUMA: 
Valongi vatela kushinganyeka chakukunama, kushimutwila nakuzachila hamwe. 
KASANGUMWISO 
1. Iya ahanjikaho lyehi chipwe kwivwa muthu ali nakuhanjika chipwe kuta 
mukunyi, tushimutwiji, tukasalimi, mijimbu navishimo? 
2. Longi umwe atenga mukunyi chipwe kuhanjika kakasalimi chipwe kuta 
mujimbu. 
3. Mukushinganyeka chove, ulemu muka uli hakuhanjika mukunyi, kuta vishimo, 
tushimutwiji, tukasalimi, mujimbu navishimo? 
 
MAZU AMAHYA 
1. Mavungu/livungu 
2. Kunoneka 
3. Ndaka 
4. Kunawa 
5. Khumbu 
6. Walo 
7. Hemi 
8. Mbimbiliya 
9. Tukasalimi 
10. Mbozo 
11. kuzovoloka 
 
 
MUTWE WACHIHANDE 1: MILIMO YAMIYACHI YA LITILICHA YAKUHANJIKA                       
KUJIMBULA: Muchilongeselo chino, valongi navatanjika milimo yamiyachi ya Litilicha 
yakuhanjika nakuyilumbununa. Navatanjika nawa mavungu amiyachi ya Litilicha 
yakuhanjika nakuwalumbununa. Kumakushilo navasambisa milimo yamiyachi ya 
Litilicha yakuhanjika nakusambisa mulimo yamavungu amiyachi ya Litilicha 
yakuhanjika.  
UHASHI WAKUNANGAKANA CHUMA: Valongi vatela kunoneka milimo yamavungu a 
Litilicha yakuhanjika.

13 | P a g e

’éĘ Ahulise valongi vavuluke milimo yamiyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika 
vathachikiza. 
Valongi: 
’éĘ Vavuluke miyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika vathachikiza. 
’éĘ Vavuluke milimo yamiyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika vathachikiza.

YAKUHANJIKA 
Mulongeshi:

14 | P a g e 
 
’éĘ Alweze valongi vatanjike milimo yamiyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. 
’éĘ Alweze valongi vatanjike milimo yamavungu amiyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. 
Valongi: 
’éĘ Vatanjike milimo yamiyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. 
’éĘ Vatanjike milimo yamavungu amiyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. 
 
KWEULULA MULONGESHI:  
KUTANJIKA MILIMO YAMAVUNGU AMIYACHI YA LITILICHA YAKUHANJIKA 
Tukasalimi: 
’éĘ Kuneha viseke 
’éĘ Kuzovolwesa kushinganyeka 
’éĘ Kuzovoloka mukuzachisa lilimi 
Tushimutwiji: 
’éĘ Kuneha viseke 
’éĘ Kuzovolwesa kushinganyeka 
’éĘ Kuneha vathu hamwe 
Myaso: 
’éĘ Myaso ya Kalunga - yeji kunangulanga vathu halufwelelo lwavo na Kalunga 
kavo. 
’éĘ Myaso yachisemwa - yeji kunangulanga vathu vyachisemwa. 
’éĘ Myaso yavanyike - yeji kuholesa vana vavandende mangana vahole. 
’éĘ Myaso yahamilimo - yeji kuhana ngolo kuli vathu vali nakuzata milimo. 
’éĘ Myaso yazangi - yeji kwambululanga zangi. 
’éĘ Myaso yahakufwa- yeji kulembejeka vathu vanafwisa nakusangejeka mbozo. 
 
Vishimo navishimolonga 
’éĘ Vishimo vyakumika- vyapwa vyakukafwa vathu mangana vahase kulinga 
milimo yavo nakusuuluka. 
’éĘ Vishimo vyakuhuhumuna - vyeji kukanda vathu vaze kaveshi kwivwilila 
mumazu avakwavoko. 
’éĘ Vishimo vyakukafwa - vyeji kusolola ulemu watwamamo mukulikafwa umwe 
namukwavo.

15 | P a g e 
 
’éĘ Vishimo vyamisende - vyeji kulweza vathu luyando lwavo nakunyengetela 
chavo mujila yakuswama. 
Jindaka (idioms) 
’éĘ Kuyemesa lilimi 
’éĘ Kulweza vishinganyeka vyakujiminyina 
’éĘ Kuneha miselo 
Mijimbu vafwelela vathu 
’éĘ Mijimbu yakutenga - yeji kulumbununa kutenga chakaye kuli Kalunga. 
’éĘ Mijimbu yachisemwa - yeji kulweza vathu maputukilo achisemwa chavo. 
’éĘ Mijimbu yaundume - yeji kwambululanga vathu valingile vyuma 
vyakukomwesa. 
SETEKO YAKUNANGAKANA: Milimo yamavungu amiyachi ya Litilicha yakutanjika 
mukwoloka.  
VYAKULINGA 3: KULUMBUNUNA MILIMO YAMIYACHI YA LITILICHA 
YAKUHANJIKA 
Mulongeshi: 
’éĘ Alweze valongi vatanjike miyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. 
’éĘ Alweze valongi valumbunune milimo yamiyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. 
Valongi: 
’éĘ Vatanjike miyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. 
’éĘ Valumbunune milimo yamiyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. 
KWEULULA MULONGESHI:  
KULUMBUNUNA MILIMO YAMIYACHI YA LITILICHA YAKUHANJIKA 
1. Miyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika yakufwana nge tukasalimi tweji kukafwa 
mwakuzachishila lilimi nakulamuna mukuhanjika. 
2. Litilicha yakuhanjika yeji kuneha kulivwisa kuwaha nakuneha vathu hamwe. 
3. Litilicha yakuhanjika yeji kuzovolwesa nakukafwa kuwana jijila 
jakukumishilamo ukalu. 
4. Kuzachisa miyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika hijila imwe yakunangwilamo 
chisemwa chavathu kufuma kuchisemunwino chimwe nakuya 
kuchisemunwino chikwavo.

16 | P a g e 
 
5. Litilicha yakuhanjika yeji kukinga chisemwa chavathu kuchina kunawa. Myaso 
navishimo naluno lwola kuvili kuhichila mu Litilicha yakuhanjika. 
6. Litilicha yakuhanjika yapwa jila imwe yakulitambasanyinamo mijimbu 
navyuma vyasolokele kumyaka.  
7. Vilika vyakufwana nge mukanda, Likumbi lya Mize navilika vikwavo vyeji 
kukafwa kulama chisemwa chavathu havyuma vyakumyaka. 
8. Litilicha yakuhanjika yapwa kathachikijilo kavathu. Kusesa mazo, kuchata 
lumba namakishi tunapu tuthachikijilo twava Luvale. 
SETEKO YAKUNANGAKANA: Milimo yamiyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika 
kuyilumbununa mukutamo. 
VYAKULINGA 4: KULUMBUNUNA MILIMO YAMIYACHI YA LITILICHA 
YAKUHANJIKA 
Mulongeshi: 
’éĘ Alweze valongi vatanjike miyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. 
’éĘ Alweze valongi valumbunune milimo yamiyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. 
Valongi: 
’éĘ Vatanjike miyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. 
’éĘ Valumbunune milimo yamiyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. 
KWEULULA MULONGESHI:  
KULUMBUNUNA MILIMO YAMIYACHI YA LITILICHA YAKUHANJIKA 
1. Vishimo navishimolonga: Eyi himijimbu yayihi vechi kwambululanga vathu 
kuhichila mukushimutwila. Mijimbu khana kayapwa yaungeji kuli vathuko. Eyi 
mijimbu yechi kutanda kufuma hachisemunwino chimwe nakuya 
kuchisemunwino chikwavo kuhichila mukuyambulula mukuhanjika. 
Milimo yavishimo navishimolonga 
’éĘ Vishimo navishimolonga vyeji kuhana chinyingi nakweulula vathu mangana 
vatwame kanawa muchitungilo. 
’éĘ Vishimo navishimolonga vyeji kuhana ulemu wachisemwa chavathu. 
’éĘ Vishimo navishimolonga vyeji kuneha chivwasano mukachi kavathu. 
2. Mijimbu vafwelela vathu: Eyi inapu mijimbu yayihi vechi kwambululanga 
vathu mujingalila javo kweseka navyuma vyavasolokelelenga, vyakufwana 
nge mijimbu ya Kalulu, jingonde, vikishikishi navikwavo.  
Milimo yamijimbu vafwelela vathu

17 | P a g e 
 
’éĘ Kulumbununa vyuma vyakutenga kuli Kalunga- mijimbu yakutenga chalilu 
namavu. 
’éĘ Ulemu wachisemwa- yeji kusolola ulemu nakulumbununa chisemwa. 
3. Mijimbu yatunyama: Eyi yapwa mijimbu yayihi yazala too navihande 
vyatunyama. 
Milimo yamijimbu yatunyama 
’éĘ Yeji kwinyikanga vilinga vyavathu mukatwamino kavo- mijimbu yakufwana 
nge yambwanda kapeza yeji kwimanyinako vilinga vyavathu twatwama navo 
muchitungilo. 
’éĘ Kuhana chinyingi namangana muli vathu- mumijimbu eyi, mwatwama 
chinyingi chakujiminyina chinahase kukafwako vathu. 
’éĘ Yeji kuneha viseke nakuneha vathu hamwe -yeji kuneha kulivwisa kuwaha 
nakuwanyisa vathu hamwe. 
4. Tushimutwiji: Tushimutwiji inapu hanjikiso yakuliswaminyina eyi yechi 
kwesekanga kuvanguluka hachinyingi chamuthu. 
      Mulimo yatushimutwiji: 
’éĘ Kuneha viseke - tweji kuneha kulivwisa kuwaha nakuwanyisa vathu hamwe. 
’éĘ Kuzovolwesa kushinganyeka - tushimutwishi tweji kulingisa vanyike 
vashinganyeke mwakukunama mangana vawane jikumbulwilo. 
’éĘ Kuneha vathu hamwe - tweji kuneha usendo mukachi kavanyike omu 
navalikungulula hamwe. 
 
5. Jindaka: Ndaka unapu mukuku wamazu mwazachisa muthu oloze 
lumbunwiso yacho kayechi kuyivwishisa kanawako nge muya halizu halizu 
kuvanga vene uvuluke mukuku wosena.  
      Milimo yajindaka (idioms) 
’éĘ Kuyemesa lilimi - jindaka japwa nge mungwa wakuhaka muyifwo mangana 
iyeme. 
’éĘ Kulweza vishinganyeka vyakujiminyina - jeji kukafwa kulweza vishinganyeka 
vyakusweka.  
’éĘ Kuneha miselo - yeji kuneha kulivwisa kuwaha. 
 
6. Myaso: Myaso nakukina muvyendela kweseka nachisemwa chavathu. Myaso 
yechi kupwangako kweseka namuyachi wachilika vali nawo vathu. 
       Milimo yamyaso 
’éĘ Viseke - yeji kuneha kulivwisa kuwaha nakuwanyisa vathu hamwe.

18 | P a g e 
 
’éĘ Kunangula - mumyaso mwatwama mazu awa anahase kunangula muthu 
havyuma vyavivulu omu mwawivwilila muthu. 
’éĘ Kwambulula mijimbu - kuzachisa mwaso, vathu vanahase kwambulula vyuma 
navatonda kuhichila mumwaso. 
’éĘ Kulama chisemwa - myaso yapwa nge khumbu veji kulaminangamo vathu 
chisemwa chavo. 
’éĘ Chivwasano - mazu ali mumyaso eji kulweza vathu havyuma vili nakusoloka

1. MIJIMBU YAMUCHANO NAYEYI YAKUTAKA (PROSE- FICTION AND NON-
FICTION) 
(a) Mujimbu wawihi (Short story) - wapwa mujimbu wakutaka ou vanahase 
kutanga nakuukumisa mulwola lwalundende. Unahase kupwa najisali 25 
nakutwala ku 30. Hakupwa mujimbu khana wahihi, watwama nawalo (plot) 
umwe kaha nawa wawashi. Mumujimbu ou, vahemi mwazachisa 
mukakusoneka vapwa vavandende. 
(b) Mujimbu wapindakachi (Novellet)- wapwa mujimbu wakutaka ou unasuhuko 
chindende kufuma kumujimbu wawihi. Unahase kupwa najisali kufuma ku 60 
nakutwala ku 120. Watwama nawalo (plot) tunyama mwazachisa 
mukakusoneka vapwa vavavulu.  
(c) Mujimbu wausuku (Novel) - wapwa mujimbu wakutaka ou watwama najisali 
kufuma ha 120 nakutwala kwilu. Wapwa wakukunama chikuma 
kuhambakana mujimbu wapindakachi (novella). Watwama najiwalo (plots) 
jajivulu, kupwa chavahemi (characters) veji kuchilumbununa mukukunama 
chikuma. Mujimbu ou weji kumbata lwola lwalusuku numba ukume kuutanga 
(d) Mujimbu wachisemwa chamuthu (Autobiography) - ou wapwa mujimbu 
wamuchano muthu ivene mwasoneka hachiyoyelo chenyi. 
(e) Mujimbu wamuchano (Biography) ŌĆō ou wapwa mujimbu wahachiyoyelo 
chamuthu navasoneka kuli muthu wekha. Mujimbu khana weji 
kwambululanga vathu vavatonyi chipwe vaze vanafu lyehi.  
(f) Chaulo (Essay) - ou mujimbu weji kusolwesanga vishinganyeka vyamuthu, 
kuhana unjiho hachuma chipwe kulumbununa vyuma. Kechi ngocho kahako, 
chaulo nawa cheji kuhana kuhakwila chamuthu hachihande mwasoneka. 
2. MIKUNYI (POETRY) 
(a) Mukunyi Wamwaso (Lyric poem)- ou wapwa mukunyi wawihi mangana vathu 
vevwenga kuwaha chipwe uvakwate kuvishinganyeka vyavo. Ou mukunyi khana 
yapwa yakusuulwisa vathu kuvilika. Unahase kutala hazangi, kheke, milingu 
navikwavo. Tweji kuyizachisanga mukuyoya chetu chahakumbi-hakumbi. 
(b) Chaliso (Panegyric)- ou unapu mukunyi wakwalisa muthu wamulemu chikuma 
muwangana chipwe muchiyulo mwomwo haundume wenyi. Undume unahase 
kufuma kukuhasa jita chipwe unyanga.  Ou muthu khana nahase kupwa

thwamina walifuchi, mwangana chipwe muthu wakuhamuka alingile milimo 
yayilemu. Mukunyi ou vanahase kuuhanjika chipwe kuwimba nge mwaso. 
(c) Myaso (Songs) - yapwa mikunyi mwomwo veji kuyisoneka muvesi. Myaso nawa 
ili muvihanda vyavivulu. Kuli ya Kalunga, yachisemwa, yamilingu, yavanyike, 
yavathu namiyachi ikwavo.  
(d) Mukunyi Wachinyengo (Elergy) - ou   wapwa mukunyi chipwe mwaso 
wakwimbila hakufwa mangana valembejeke vaze vanafwisa nakwanuka nawa

KUJIMBULA:

VYAKULINGA 1:  KULUMBUNUNA VIHANDA VYAWALO WAMUJIMBU 
WAKUHANJIKA 
Mulongeshi:  
’éĘ Alweze longi umwe alifwanyise nge khaka natwame kulijiko nakulweza 
vazukulu jenyi mujimbu evwile chipwe amwene. 
’éĘ Alweze valongi vatongole tuthachikijilo twawalo wamujimbu vanevwilila kuli 
mukwavo longi. 
’éĘ ALweze valongi mangana valumbunune tuthachikijilo tuli hamujimbu 
vanevwilila kuli mukwavo longi. 
Valongi:  
’éĘ Umwe wavo alifwanyise nge khaka ali nakulweza vazukulu mujimbu kulijiko. 
’éĘ Vahemo chihemo chakulilweza mujimbu kulijiko. 
’éĘ Vatongole tuthachikijilo twawalo wamujimbu vanevwilila kuli mukwavo 
longi. 
KWEULULA MULONGESHI:  
TUTHACHIKIJILO TWAWALO WAMUJIMBU WAKUHANJIKA 
1. Maputukilo (Exposition)

51 | P a g e 
 
Echi chikhiko kuputuka chamujimbu, omu vahemi navavajimbula kuli mukakuhanjika. 
Vahemi navajimbula shina vaze vavanene. Mukakuhanjika nawa eji kujimbula chihela 
kwasolokelele uze mujimbu nalwola wasolokele. 
2. Kuputuka chaphinda (Rising action) 
Echi chikhiko kuputuka chaukalu weji kupwangamo mukachi kavahemi vali muze 
mumujimbu. Phindangano yeji kutwalililaho mukachi kavo. 
3. Kutohwa chaphindangano (Climax) 
Aka kathachikijilo kakhiko katwama nakuwaha chikuma mumujimbu mwomwo 
phindanagano inatoho chikuma. Kakathachikijilo khana keji kwiza kwakamwihi 
namakumishilo amujimbu. Nge unakwivwilila mujimbu omu nauheta vene aha, 
numba vali nakukusanyika, yove kawechi kwivwako mwomwo mangana ove osena 
ali kumujimbu. 
4. Kukumisa phindangano (Falling action) 
Aha jino hakhiko haseteko vahemi veji kuwananga jijila jakukumishilamo ukalu 
mukachi kavo. Mujila ikwavo tunahase kwamba ngwetu hakhiko hakuwanyina 
muhanga wakutumba mbuto. Seteko khana eyi, yeji kwizanga hanyima yakuyema 
chamujimbu.  
5. Makumishilo (Conclusion) 
Echi khikhiko kukuma chipwe kukhukulula chamujimbu.  
SETEKO YAKUNANGAKANA: Tuthachikijilo twawalo wamujimbu wakuhanjika 
kutushimutwila mukwoloka.
